raw_consumer_statement: Dealing with Home Depot 's credit card customer service through Citibank has been nothing short of a nightmare. They lowered the credit line and the card was lost and used fraudulently. Now I am over my credit line and this is causing my XXXX XXXX to take a negative hit and affecting my everyday life. I want this account closed immediately and I want Home Depot Credit services to never contact me again. Only communication in writing. Close this account immediately and I will be getting legal involved to get this removed from my credit reports
